mapper.sql: id, disabled, key, value, description, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select value from db_config where key = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: insert into db_config (id, disabled, key, value, description, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT}, #{key,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{value,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into db_config
id,
disabled,
key,
value,
description,
created_at,
updated_at,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{disabled,jdbcType=BIT},
#{key,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{value,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update db_config
disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT},
key = #{key,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
value = #{value,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update db_config set disabled = #{disabled,jdbcType=BIT}, key = #{key,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, value = #{value,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_at = #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_at = #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
